# Budget

This section presents four budget scenarios for planning and filing discussion:

- `1023-EZ`
- `Good`
- `Great`
- `Excellent`

The `1023-EZ` scenario is the only one designed to remain under the projected gross-receipts ceiling associated with `1023-EZ`. The other three scenarios are useful for strategic planning and for evaluating whether the full `Form 1023` is the more realistic filing path.

## 1023-EZ

{{< include 04_budget_1023_ez.qmd >}}

## Good

{{< include 05_budget_good.qmd >}}

## Great

{{< include 06_budget_great.qmd >}}

## Excellent

{{< include 07_budget_excellent.qmd >}}
